name: red metal room
description: I'm in a red metal room
hints: An empty red metal room. There may be hidden features or items that appear under certain conditions.
Search carefully - LOOK around, FEEL WALLS. Some items only appear after certain puzzles are solved.
If nothing is here, you may need to activate something elsewhere first. Return WEST to the console room.
notes: Dead-end red metal room. Only exit is west to room 12. May contain items or features that appear after certain conditions are met elsewhere in the ship.
